Dialog.name: MSG_JUNPEI_TARTAROS_0102
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}Hey, let's go to Tartarus. Start the new year off strong, y'know?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}I mean, if we just take it easy, that'll just make me more nervous at this point.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_JUNPEI_0102
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}Hey, wanna hit up Tartarus later?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}C'mon, we're two days into the new year already! We can't just sit around all year![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}Anyway, kidding aside, let's start the new year off strong, huh?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_JUNPEI_OK_0102
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}I kinda feel like just sittin' around, tryin' to relax, isn't very relaxing anymore, y'know?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}But it feels like we started off the new year strong. Maybe a sign of what's to come?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_YUKARI_TARTAROS_0104
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}I've been seeing a lot of graffiti and creepy posters around lately...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}And a lot of people have been acting weirdly, too. I wonder if it's somehow related to Nyx...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}Hey, let's go to Tartarus. A month's gonna totally fly by, ya know.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_YUKARI_0104
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}I've been seeing a lot of graffiti and creepy posters around lately...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}And a lot of people have been acting weirdly, too. I wonder if it's somehow related to Nyx...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}Hey, why don't we go to Tartarus again? We should try to get as strong as we can.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_YUKARI_OK_0104
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}I've been seeing a lot of graffiti and creepy posters around lately...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}And a lot of people have been acting weirdly, too. I wonder if it's somehow related to Nyx...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_MITURU_TARTAROS_0106
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 4 1}, why don't we go to Tartarus tonight?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}Unlike the end of last year, we now have a clear goal—to reach the top of Tartarus.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}We must not falter before even approaching Nyx.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}We have to do all that we can.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_MITURU_0106
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 4 1}, why don't we go to Tartarus again tonight?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}We have a duty to defeat Nyx.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}For this particular mission, I don't believe the concept of "overpreparing" applies.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_FUKA_TARTAROS_0108
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}The school somehow feels different from last year. It has a strange atmosphere, doesn't it?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}A lot of students in my class were talking about cults and other weird things...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}I imagine this has something to do with the coming of Nyx...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5077 0 0}...Well, let me know if you want to go to Tartarus.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_FUKA_0108
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}The school somehow feels different from last year. It has a strange atmosphere, doesn't it?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}A lot of students in my class were talking about cults and other weird things...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}I imagine this has something to do with the coming of Nyx...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5077 0 0}...Well, let me know if you want to go to Tartarus. I want to do everything I can to help out.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_FUKA_OK_0108
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}The school somehow feels different from last year. It has a strange atmosphere, doesn't it?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}A lot of students in my class were talking about cults and other weird things...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}I imagine this has something to do with the coming of Nyx...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5025 0 0}...We can't lose. Let's get past the Promised Day![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_SANADA_TARTAROS_0109
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}Only three more weeks till X-Day.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}The fate of the entire world... I'm not concerning myself with all that right now.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}All I'm thinking about at this moment is moving forward.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3061 0 0}So let me know when you want to go to Tartarus.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_SANADA_0109
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}Only three more weeks till X-Day.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}The fate of the entire world... I'm not concerning myself with all that right now.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}All I'm thinking about at this moment is the final bout.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3061 0 0}If you want to get stronger too, I'd be happy to be your training partner.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_SANADA_OK_0109
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}Only three more weeks till X-Day.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}The fate of the entire world... I'm not concerning myself with all that right now.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}All I'm thinking about at this moment is moving forward.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_AMADA_TARTAROS_0111
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 -1 -1 0 0}Today is Coming of Age Day.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 -1 -1 0 0}I don't want my life to end before I become an adult.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 -1 -1 0 0}Um... I'd like to go to Tartarus tonight.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 -1 -1 0 0}I can't just stand back and watch the world end...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_AMADA_0111
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 -1 -1 0 0}Today is Coming of Age Day.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 -1 -1 0 0}I don't want my life to end before I become an adult.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 -1 -1 0 0}So... let's keep getting stronger and stronger until the last fight.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 -1 -1 0 0}I cannot just stand back and watch the world end...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_AMADA_OK_0111
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 -1 -1 0 0}Today is Coming of Age Day.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 -1 -1 0 0}I don't want my life to end before I become an adult.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 -1 -1 0 0}And then, just like always... let's all come back here together.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_HUKA_TARTAROS_0113
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}We're almost halfway through January.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}Today is the 13th, so we only have eighteen more days.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 -1 -1 0 0}Um, {f 4 1}-kun... Why don't we go to Tartarus today?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 -1 -1 0 0}I think it would be best to do all we can right now, even if we have to push ourselves a little.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_HUKA_0113
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}We're almost halfway through January.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}Today is the 13th, so we only have eighteen more days.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 -1 -1 0 0}Um, {f 4 1}-kun... Why don't we go to Tartarus today as well?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 -1 -1 0 0}I think we should use what time we have to get as strong as we can.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_HUKA_OK_0113
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}We're almost halfway through January.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}Today is the 13th, so we only have eighteen more days.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}To be honest, I was still nervous until recently.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 -1 0 0}But I'm not nervous anymore. I know that we'll be all right.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_AEGIS_TARTAROS_0115
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}Um... Why don't we go to Tartarus tonight?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}I feel like it has been a while since I was the one to suggest we go.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 3 -1 -1 0 0}After I was released from the lab following my repairs, I was so confused...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}But I'm not confused anymore.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 6003 0 0}I want to be by your side... and fight together with you.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_AEGIS_OK_0115
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}Time seems to pass by so quickly lately. It's already the middle of January...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}I know what I want to do... And that is to fight alongside you.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_YUKARI_TARTAROS_0116
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}Mitsuru-senpai and Sanada-senpai went to take their entrance exams today.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}And they're going again tomorrow, too. How do they concentrate with everything going on?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_SANADA_TARTAROS_0116
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3031 0 0}Why wouldn't I concentrate? I'm not about to give up.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_MITURU_TARTAROS_0116
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4130 0 0}I suppose you could say we are defying fate.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}But I want to ensure that I'm doing everything that I can be doing.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}Which is to say that I won't give up either.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_SANADA_TARTAROS_0116
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3074 0 0}By the way, if you're going to Tartarus, I'll go with you.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 1 -1 -1 0 0}The final battle's in a couple weeks. I'm not putting training on hold just 'cause of some exam.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_YUKARI_TARTAROS_0116
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1110 0 0}Wow... I don't know if I can keep up, but... at the very least, I won't give up either.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_AEGIS_TARTAROS_0119
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 6025 0 0}He seems to be saying, "Let's go to Tartarus tonight."[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_AEGIS_OK_0119
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 6025 0 0}He seems to be saying, "We will win."[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_FUKA_TARTAROS_0119
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5116 0 0}Yes, I agree. We will win, together![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_JUNPEI_TARTAROS_0120
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}Hey, let's go to Tartarus tonight.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}Just ten more days after today. We gotta get psyched up![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_JUNPEI_0120
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}Hey, let's go to Tartarus tonight.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}Just ten more days after today. I wanna train some more, just in case, y'know?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_JUNPEI_0120_2
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2009 0 0}Cool. I'm ready to go when you are![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_JUNPEI_0120_3
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2036 0 0}C'mon, man! Ya know what's better than being strong? Being too strong![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}I mean, anyone can be just normal strong. But we're heroes, so we gotta get too strong![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_JUNPEI_OK_0120
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}After today, it'll be just ten more days 'til the day Ryoji was talkin' about, huh...?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}Alright, I'm hyped! We're gonna blow that Nyx thing away![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_SANADA_TARTAROS_0124
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}Just one week left until the 31st.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}You probably already know this, but just in case...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 0 1 2}Once we enter Tartarus on January 31st, we won't be able to leave until the battle's over.{f 0 1 27}[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}Losing isn't an option, so spend your time this last week wisely.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_FUKA_TARTAROS_0125_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}Today might be our last Monday...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 -1 -1 0 0}If we don't win, there won't be another...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_YUKARI_TARTAROS_0125
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}That's right. We can't afford to doubt ourselves, even a little bit. We will win, no matter what.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_YUKARI_TARTAROS_0126
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}Only five more days until the Promised Day...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}But we're gonna break that "promise."[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}Hey, you wanna go to Tartarus later? I'm starting to get a little antsy, so let's get moving![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_YUKARI_OK_0126
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}Only five more days until the Promised Day...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}But we're gonna break that "promise."[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}...I'm trying to not overthink it too much, but it's kinda hard not to, ya know...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_SANADA_TARTAROS_0127
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}Four more days... I can practically feel Nyx breathing down my neck at this point.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}Let me know whenever you want to go to Tartarus, even if it's every single night.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}We've come so far... Nothing's more important than this.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_SANADA_0127
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}Four more days... I can practically feel Nyx breathing down my neck at this point.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}Let me know whenever you want to go to Tartarus. I want to push myself to my limits.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}We've come so far... Nothing's more important than this.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_SANADA_OK_0127
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}Four more days... I can practically feel Nyx breathing down my neck at this point.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}Prepare in every way possible so you don't regret anything. I'm doing my own preparations, too.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}We've come so far... Nothing's more important than this.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_JUNPEI_TARTAROS_0128
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}Only three more days, man. I'm kinda lookin' forward to it, but also... kinda not.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}Anyway, wanna go to Tartarus later? Gotta keep our sweet muscles toned, y'know?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}Well, whatever. I'll leave it up to you.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}After everything we've been through, I totally believe in you, dude.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_JUNPEI_0128
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}Only three more days, man. I'm kinda lookin' forward to it, but also... kinda not.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}So, what're ya thinkin'? Should we head to Tartarus for some extra training?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}Well, whatever we do's up to you. I know you'll steer us in the right direction, like always.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}So it's up to you, Leader![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_JUNPEI_OK_0128
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}Only three more days, man. I'm kinda lookin' forward to it, but also... kinda not.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}Hey... I know I've given you some shit before, but I'm fully behind you now, dude.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}So let's give Nyx hell! Whaddaya say, Leader?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_MITURU_TARTAROS_0129
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}Just two days left now...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}It's cold and dreary outside, and I couldn't blame you for feeling even drearier at the moment.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}But we need to just hang on a little while longer. Spring is just around the corner, as they say.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_AEGIS_TARTAROS_0130
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}It has been ten years since Death awakened...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}And now, finally, tomorrow is the Promised Day.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 6059 0 0}{f 0 1 2}Once we enter Tartarus tomorrow, we won't be able to leave.{f 0 1 27}[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_WELCOME_AEGIS_OUT_NA
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 6017 0 0}Welcome back. It's good to see you again.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_WELCOME_YUKARI_IN2
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1012 0 0}Oh, you're here? Sorry, guess I missed you...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_WELCOME_SANADA_IN
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3024 0 0}Were you in your room all this time?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_WELCOME_FUKA_IN
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5067 0 0}Oh, hello! I didn't realize you were already here.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_WELCOME_IKUTSUKI_IN
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 14204 0 0}Oh, I didn't know you were already here. As you can see, I've come over for a quick visit.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_SHYUKAKU_OK
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Come to think of it, the crops I planted on the[n]rooftop should be ready to harvest by now...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Maybe I should go check on them...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_SHYUKAKU_TAIYAKI_OK
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Come to think of it, the crops I planted on the[n]rooftop should be ready to harvest by now...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}...And the taiyaki I put in the[n]fridge should be chilled, too.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Maybe I should go check on them...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_SHYUKAKU_TAIYAKI_OK_
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Come to think of it, the crops I planted on the[n]rooftop should be ready to harvest by now...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}...And the taiyaki I put in the[n]fridge should be chilled, too.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I should get it from the fridge[n]and give it to Elizabeth...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_TAIYAKI_OK
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Come to think of it, the taiyaki I put in[n]the fridge should be chilled by now...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Maybe I should go get it...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_TAIYAKI_OK_QUEST
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Come to think of it, the taiyaki I put in[n]the fridge should be chilled by now...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I should get it from the fridge[n]and give it to Elizabeth...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_ERROR
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}エラーメッセージです。[cr][n]{f 1 5 0}杉山まで報告ください。[cr][n]{f 1 1}
